title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering separates the wrapping infrastructure around AI coding agents from the model itself, treating the harness as the critical component for reliability and scale. It operates at two levels: the AI layer managing rules, skills, hooks, and subagents within a session, and orchestration across multiple focused agent sessions to handle larger tasks reliably.
